question: Does the board have explicit oversight responsibility for climate-related risks and opportunities?
How frequently does the board review climate-related issues?
Is there a dedicated board committee for sustainability/climate matters?
How are climate competencies assessed and built at the board level?
Are climate-related KPIs linked to executive compensation?
How does the board receive information on emerging climate risks?
Does the board approve the organization's climate strategy and targets?
Which C-suite executive has primary accountability for climate-related risks?
Is there a Chief Sustainability Officer (CSO) or equivalent role?
What management-level committees oversee climate risk assessment?
How frequently does management report climate matters to the board?
Are climate responsibilities embedded in job descriptions and performance reviews?
How does management integrate climate considerations into business planning?
Has the organization identified all material physical climate risks (acute & chronic)?
Has the organization identified all material transition risks (policy, legal, technology, market, reputational)?
What time horizons are used — short (0–2 yrs), medium (2–10 yrs), long (10+ yrs)?
What geographic scope is covered in the risk assessment (assets, supply chains, markets)?
Are climate-related opportunities (resource efficiency, new products, markets) formally identified?
Is a formal climate risk register maintained and regularly updated?
How are Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions mapped to business units?
How do identified climate risks and opportunities affect the organization's core strategy?
Are climate considerations integrated into capital allocation decisions?
How does climate change affect demand for the organization's products/services?
Has the organization assessed stranded asset risk within its portfolio?
What strategic pivots or adaptations are planned in response to climate change?
Are climate factors incorporated into M&A due diligence?
How is the supply chain assessed for climate vulnerability?
Has the organization conducted formal climate scenario analysis?
Which scenarios are used — e.g., IEA NZE, IPCC RCP 2.6, RCP 4.5, RCP 8.5, NGFS?
Does scenario analysis cover both a well-below-2°C and a higher-warming pathway?
What is the time horizon of scenario analysis?
Are physical and transition risks both modeled under each scenario?
How are scenario outputs translated into financial impacts (revenue, capex, opex)?
How frequently is scenario analysis refreshed?
Are third-party experts or tools used to conduct scenario analysis?
What processes are used to identify climate-related risks across the value chain?
How are climate risks categorized — by likelihood, severity, velocity, reversibility?
Are physical risk assessments conducted at the asset/facility level?
Are transition risks assessed by regulatory jurisdiction?
How does the organization stay current with climate science and policy developments?
Are climate risks assessed for both owned assets and leased/third-party facilities?
Is climate risk incorporated into the enterprise risk taxonomy?
What is the organization's risk appetite statement for climate-related risks?
What mitigation measures are in place for high-priority physical risks?
What mitigation measures are in place for high-priority transition risks?
Does the organization use climate risk transfer mechanisms (insurance, derivatives)?
Are climate risks included in business continuity and disaster recovery plans?
How are climate risks managed within the supply chain?
Are nature-related risks (biodiversity, water, land use) assessed alongside climate risks?
Are climate risks formally integrated into the ERM framework?
How does climate risk rank relative to other enterprise risks?
Is climate risk included in the organization's risk appetite statement?
Are internal audit processes covering climate risk management?
Are climate-related risks included in regulatory and compliance risk registers?
GHG Emissions Metrics
Does the organization measure and report Scope 1 GHG emissions?
Does the organization measure and report Scope 2 GHG emissions (location-based and market-based)?
Does the organization measure and report Scope 3 GHG emissions across all relevant categories?
Which GHG Protocol standard or equivalent methodology is used?
Is GHG data independently verified/assured (limited or reasonable assurance)?
What is the base year for GHG accounting, and how are recalculations handled?
What proportion of assets/revenue is exposed to physical climate risk?
What proportion of assets/revenue is exposed to transition risk?
What is the current and projected internal carbon price used in decision-making?
What are the estimated financial impacts of climate risks on capex and opex?
What percentage of capex is aligned with climate transition (green capex)?
Has the organization calculated its climate Value-at-Risk (climate VaR)?
Are water usage and water stress metrics tracked?
Are energy consumption and energy intensity metrics tracked?
Are renewable energy targets and current usage percentages disclosed?
Has the organization set a net-zero target, and by what year?
Are near-term (2025–2030) GHG reduction targets in place?
Are targets validated by the Science Based Targets initiative (SBTi)?
Are targets covering Scope 1, 2, and material Scope 3 emissions?
Does the organization have a formal decarbonization roadmap with milestones?
Are adaptation targets set alongside mitigation targets?
Are targets embedded in annual business planning and budgeting?
Are climate targets publicly disclosed and externally verified?
What mechanisms exist to course-correct if the organization is off-track?
Are supplier-level emission reduction targets in place?
Is the TCFD disclosure aligned with other frameworks (GRI, SASB, CDP, ISSB/IFRS S2)?
Is the climate disclosure included in mainstream financial filings (annual report, 10-K)?
Is there a standalone sustainability/climate report published?
Has the disclosure been reviewed by external auditors or assurance providers?
Is the TCFD index clearly labeled and cross-referenced in reporting?
How are investor expectations on climate incorporated into strategy?
Are customers, suppliers, and communities engaged on climate risks?
Is the organization a signatory to any climate commitments (e.g., Race to Zero, RE100)?
How does the organization engage with regulators on climate policy?
Are climate-related lobbying positions consistent with the organization's stated climate ambitions?
What is your total energy consumption in data centers, broken down by purchased electricity, renewable energy, and on-site generation? Metric: GJ; % renewable
What percentage of your total energy consumption is derived from grid electricity versus renewable sources (on-site and purchased)? Metric: % of total
How does your organization manage and reduce the energy intensity of its IT infrastructure, including PUE (Power Usage Effectiveness) targets? Metric: PUE ratio
Describe your water management strategy for data center cooling, including total water withdrawn and consumed. Metric: m³
How many user accounts or records were involved in data breaches or unauthorized disclosures during the reporting period? Metric: Number; % affected
Describe your policies and governance mechanisms for user data privacy, including GDPR, CCPA, and other regulatory compliance frameworks. Metric: Discussion
How many government requests for user data did you receive, and what percentage resulted in disclosure? Metric: Number; % compliance
What processes exist to balance legal obligations with protecting user freedom of expression and privacy rights? Metric: Discussion
How many data security incidents occurred in the reporting period, and what was the total number of records exposed? Metric: Number of incidents; records
Describe your cybersecurity framework (e.g., NIST, ISO 27001) and how it is integrated into enterprise risk management. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of employees received cybersecurity awareness training during the period? Metric: % of employees
Describe your incident response, business continuity, and disaster recovery plans related to cybersecurity breaches. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your employees are female, and what is the representation of underrepresented groups at the management and executive level? Metric: % by gender, ethnicity
What is your employee turnover rate, and how does it compare across technical and non-technical roles? Metric: % turnover
Describe your strategies for recruiting, retaining, and developing a diverse workforce, including upskilling and reskilling programs. Metric: Discussion
Describe any legal proceedings or regulatory actions related to anticompetitive behavior, IP infringement, or unfair business practices during the period. Metric: Number; $ amount
How do you protect proprietary IP while ensuring interoperability and compliance with open standards? Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your products, by revenue, have undergone third-party energy efficiency certification (e.g., ENERGY STAR, EPEAT)? Metric: % revenue
What is the amount of e-waste generated and recovered through take-back programs? Metric: Metric tons
Describe your approach to designing for repairability, recyclability, and extended product life. Metric: Discussion
What is the weight of end-of-life products and e-waste recovered by your take-back programs globally? Metric: Metric tons
How do you measure and report the environmental footprint of your product portfolio, including use-phase energy consumption? Metric: GJ/unit; Discussion
What percentage of your manufacturing suppliers have been audited for labor and environmental standards compliance (e.g., RBA Code of Conduct)? Metric: % suppliers audited
How do you identify and mitigate risks of forced labor, child labor, and unsafe working conditions in your supply chain? Metric: Discussion
Do you use any conflict minerals? Describe your due diligence process per OECD guidelines. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of smelters/refiners in your supply chain have been verified as conflict-free under a recognized scheme (e.g., RMI)? Metric: %
What is the total weight of materials used in production, and what percentage is recycled or reclaimed content? Metric: MT; % recycled
Describe your strategy for reducing dependency on critical or conflict-prone raw materials, including cobalt, rare earth elements, and tin. Metric: Discussion
What are your targets for increasing recycled content in products, and how are they tracked? Metric: % targets; Discussion
How many product vulnerabilities were identified and remediated during the reporting period? Metric: Number
Describe your secure development lifecycle (SDL) and how security is embedded in product design. Metric: Discussion
What is your total energy consumption for network infrastructure? Provide breakdown by fuel type and grid electricity. Metric: GJ; % renewable
What is your total Scope 1, Scope 2, and Scope 3 GHG emissions in metric tons CO₂e? Metric: MT CO₂e by scope
Describe your targets and roadmap for net-zero or carbon neutrality, including interim milestones. Metric: Discussion
What is the energy intensity of your network (GJ per petabyte of data transmitted)? Metric: GJ/PB
What is the percentage of total electricity sourced from renewables, and what renewable procurement instruments are used (PPAs, RECs, etc.)? Metric: % renewable
How many customer records were compromised or exposed in a data breach during the period? Metric: Number
Describe your customer data monetization policies and opt-in/opt-out mechanisms for data sharing with third parties. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of customers have opted in to data-sharing programs? Metric: %
How many government requests for user data were received, and what is your policy for responding to such requests? Metric: Number; Discussion
What percentage of your network coverage serves rural, low-income, or underserved communities? Metric: % coverage; % subscribers
Describe your programs to promote affordable access and digital inclusion, including low-income tariff schemes. Metric: Discussion
What is the number of customers served by subsidized or lifeline service programs? Metric: Number
What was your network availability (uptime) percentage during the reporting period for voice and data services? Metric: % uptime
How many network outage events occurred, and what was the average duration and number of customers affected? Metric: Number; hours; customers
How many data breaches occurred, how many customers were notified, and what was the financial impact including regulatory fines and remediation costs? Metric: Number; $ amount
Describe your cybersecurity governance structure, including board-level oversight and third-party risk management. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of employees completed cybersecurity and data protection training during the period? Metric: %
What is the number and value of loans made to underserved communities under the Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) or equivalent regulatory framework? Metric: Number; $ value
Describe your programs to increase financial literacy and access for low-income and underbanked populations. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your loan portfolio is allocated to affordable housing, small business (under-served), and community development? Metric: % portfolio
How many branches or digital access points serve low- and moderate-income census tracts? Metric: Number
What percentage of your commercial and industrial loan portfolio has been assessed for ESG and climate-related risk? Metric: % by $ value
Describe how climate-related financial risks (physical and transition) are integrated into your credit underwriting and portfolio risk management. Metric: Discussion
What is your exposure to carbon-intensive sectors as a percentage of total lending? Metric: % by $ value
Have you set financed emissions targets (Scope 3 Category 15) aligned to PCAF or similar methodology? Describe your progress. Metric: MT CO₂e financed; Discussion
What is the weighted average carbon intensity (WACI) of your loan and investment portfolio? Metric: MT CO₂e / $ million revenue
How many instances of non-compliance with anti-money laundering (AML) regulations occurred, and what were the associated penalties? Metric: Number; $ fines
What is the total amount of monetary losses due to legal proceedings related to fraud, mis-selling, or consumer protection violations? Metric: $ amount
Describe your governance framework for managing conflicts of interest, whistleblowing, and ethical conduct including senior management accountability. Metric: Discussion
What is the total number of substantiated complaints related to customer harm or mis-selling? Metric: Number
Is your institution designated as a Systemically Important Financial Institution (SIFI)? Describe your recovery and resolution planning. Metric: Yes/No; Discussion
What is your Common Equity Tier 1 (CET1) capital ratio, and how does stress testing inform your capital adequacy planning? Metric: % CET1
Describe your approach to managing liquidity risk and how it has been stress-tested under adverse scenarios. Metric: Discussion
What is the total value of customer assets under management or advisory mandates subject to fiduciary duty obligations? Metric: $ AUM
How many customer complaints related to conflicts of interest or unsuitable investment recommendations were received and resolved? Metric: Number
Describe your policies for managing conflicts of interest in underwriting, research, and advisory services. Metric: Discussion
What is the total value of sustainable finance transactions (green bonds, social bonds, ESG-linked loans) arranged or underwritten? Metric: $ value
Describe how ESG risk factors are incorporated into equity research, credit ratings, and M&A due diligence. Metric: Discussion
What is the total monetary value of fines and settlements related to market manipulation, insider trading, or other regulatory violations? Metric: $ amount
Describe your anti-bribery and anti-corruption policies, training programs, and investigation outcomes. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your investment portfolio is subject to ESG integration screening? Metric: % AUM
Describe your responsible investment policy, including exclusions, engagement, and proxy voting on climate and ESG issues. Metric: Discussion
What is the carbon footprint (Scope 3) of your investment portfolio measured per $ million invested? Metric: MT CO₂e / $ million
What is your net premiums written for energy efficiency, green building, and climate-resilience insurance products? Metric: $ amount
Describe how your product portfolio addresses or incentivizes risk reduction related to climate change (e.g., usage-based auto, resilience coverage, parametric products). Metric: Discussion
What is the total amount of insured losses attributed to weather-related natural catastrophes during the reporting period? Metric: $ amount
Describe your exposure management approach for climate-related physical risks across underwriting lines. Metric: Discussion
What climate scenarios have you used to model future insured loss projections, and what are the results? Metric: Discussion
What is your combined ratio for weather-related lines, and how has it trended over five years? Metric: % combined ratio
What is the total value of assets under management (AUM) subject to ESG integration strategies? Metric: $ AUM
What percentage of proxy votes cast were in favor of climate-related shareholder resolutions? Metric: %
Describe your compensation structure for portfolio managers, including how short-term risk-taking is constrained by long-term performance and ESG metrics. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of senior employee variable compensation is linked to ESG or sustainability performance metrics? Metric: %
Describe your pricing policies, including policies for generic licensing, differential pricing by country income level, and patient assistance programs. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your revenues comes from patented products in Least Developed Countries at below-market or tiered pricing? Metric: % revenue
How many patients were reached through patient assistance or access programs during the reporting period? Metric: Number
Describe your approach to voluntary licensing of essential medicines to generic manufacturers in low-income countries. Metric: Discussion
How many recalls were issued and how many units were recalled during the reporting period? Provide breakdown by Class I, II, and III. Metric: Number; units by class
Describe your pharmacovigilance system and post-market surveillance process for identifying and responding to adverse drug reactions. Metric: Discussion
What is the total number of FDA (or equivalent regulatory body) warning letters or enforcement actions received? Metric: Number
How many serious adverse events were reported to regulatory authorities during the period? Metric: Number
Describe your systems for drug serialization, track-and-trace, and anti-counterfeiting across the distribution supply chain. Metric: Discussion
How many confirmed instances of counterfeit products were identified in your supply chain, and what actions were taken? Metric: Number; Discussion
What percentage of your active pharmaceutical ingredient (API) suppliers have been audited for quality, safety, and environmental compliance? Metric: % audited
Describe how you manage supply chain concentration risk (e.g., single-source APIs, geopolitical risks, dual sourcing strategies). Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your APIs by value are sourced from suppliers located in high-risk geographies? Metric: % value
What is the amount of legal and regulatory fines related to false marketing, off-label promotion, or anti-kickback statute violations? Metric: $ fines
Describe your marketing code of conduct and oversight mechanisms, including compliance training for sales personnel. Metric: Discussion
What is the total amount paid to physicians and healthcare professionals for speaking, consulting, and other services? Metric: $ amount
What percentage of clinical trials include diverse patient populations broken down by gender, age, and ethnicity? Metric: % diversity
Describe your policies for ensuring ethical conduct in clinical trials, including informed consent, data integrity, and site selection in vulnerable populations. Metric: Discussion
How many clinical trial sites are located in low- and middle-income countries, and what safeguards protect participants? Metric: Number; Discussion
What are your total Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions (MT CO₂e) and energy consumption (GJ) for manufacturing operations? Metric: MT CO₂e; GJ
What is the total volume of hazardous waste generated and disposed of in compliance with applicable regulations? Metric: MT; % compliant disposal
What is the total number of FDA Class I, Class II, and Class III recalls during the reporting period? Metric: Number by class
How many adverse events were reported to regulatory authorities, and what corrective and preventive actions (CAPA) were implemented? Metric: Number; Discussion
Describe your quality management system (ISO 13485 or equivalent) and post-market surveillance process. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of manufacturing facilities are certified under ISO 13485 or equivalent international quality standards? Metric: % facilities
What monetary losses resulted from legal proceedings related to anti-competitive practices or off-label marketing? Metric: $ amount
Describe your policies for transparency in physician and hospital relationships, including disclosure of payments under the Open Payments / Sunshine Act. Metric: Discussion
What is the total amount of payments made to healthcare professionals for consulting, speaking, and research purposes? Metric: $ amount
What percentage of key component suppliers have been audited for quality and regulatory compliance? Metric: % suppliers
Describe your strategy for managing risks related to single-source components and geographic concentration of supply. Metric: Discussion
What is your risk-adjusted mortality rate, readmission rate, and patient satisfaction score (e.g., HCAHPS)? Metric: Rate; score
Describe your clinical governance framework, including how quality metrics are monitored and improvement plans are implemented. Metric: Discussion
How many sentinel events or never events occurred, and what were the root cause analyses and corrective actions? Metric: Number; Discussion
How many patient records were involved in data breaches or unauthorized disclosures during the reporting period? Metric: Number
Describe your HIPAA (or equivalent) compliance program, including training, audits, and breach response procedures. Metric: Discussion
Describe how you communicate pricing information to patients before care delivery, including price transparency tools. Metric: Discussion
What is the total amount of charity care provided, and what percentage of revenue does it represent? Metric: $ amount; % revenue
What are your total Scope 1 gross GHG emissions (MT CO₂e) and the breakdown by methane and CO₂? Metric: MT CO₂e
What is your methane intensity (MT CH₄ per unit of production), and how does it compare to industry benchmarks? Metric: MT CH₄/unit
Describe your strategy for reducing methane emissions, including leak detection and repair (LDAR) programs and monitoring frequency. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of hydrocarbons vented and flared is reported, and what are your targets for flaring reduction? Metric: % total; MMscf
What is your GHG intensity (MT CO₂e per barrel of oil equivalent) and how has it trended over three years? Metric: MT CO₂e/BOE
What is the total volume of water withdrawn, consumed, and recycled or reused in your operations? Metric: m³
What percentage of your produced water is reused versus disposed of via underground injection? Metric: % reused
Describe your strategy for water management in water-stressed regions, including risk assessment methodology (e.g., WRI Aqueduct). Metric: Discussion
What is the number of hydraulic fracturing sites where water recycling programs are active? Metric: Number
What is the area of land disturbed and rehabilitated from exploration and production activities? Metric: Hectares
How many operations are located in or adjacent to protected areas or UNESCO World Heritage Sites? Metric: Number
Describe your biodiversity management plans, net-zero biodiversity loss commitments, and third-party verification approach. Metric: Discussion
Do your operations require security personnel? Describe how security arrangements comply with the Voluntary Principles on Security and Human Rights. Metric: Discussion
How do you obtain Free, Prior and Informed Consent (FPIC) from indigenous communities for projects on or near their lands? Metric: Discussion
How many human rights grievances were received from communities or employees, and how many were resolved? Metric: Number
What is the amount of community investment and social development expenditure during the reporting period? Metric: $ amount
How many formal grievances were received from local communities, and how many were resolved within the target timeframe? Metric: Number
Describe your social impact assessment process for new projects and your ongoing community engagement mechanisms. Metric: Discussion
What is the sensitivity of your proved reserves and net present value to carbon price scenarios of $50, $100, and $200 per ton CO₂? Metric: $ NPV; BOE
Describe your strategy for capital allocation in the context of the energy transition and IEA net-zero pathway scenarios. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your capex is allocated to low-carbon or renewable energy projects? Metric: % capex
What is your Total Recordable Incident Rate (TRIR) and fatality rate for employees and contractors per 200,000 hours worked? Metric: Rate
Describe your process safety management system, including major accident hazard (MAH) identification and control. Metric: Discussion
What are your total Scope 1 GHG emissions from pipeline operations, compression stations, and processing facilities? Metric: MT CO₂e
What is your methane emission intensity (MT CH₄ per MMscf of throughput)? Metric: MT CH₄/MMscf
What are your NOx, SOx, and particulate matter (PM10) emissions from compressor stations? Metric: MT
How many reportable pipeline spills occurred, and what was the total volume released and recovered? Metric: Number; m³
Describe your pipeline integrity management program, including inspection frequency and leak detection technology. Metric: Discussion
How many pipeline incidents resulted in injury, fatality, or environmental damage during the period? Metric: Number
Describe your emergency response planning and community notification procedures for pipeline incidents. Metric: Discussion
What are your total Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions (MT CO₂e) and energy consumption (GJ), broken down by fuel type? Metric: MT CO₂e; GJ
What is your energy intensity per unit of ore processed or metal produced? Metric: GJ/ton
Describe your decarbonization strategy, including transition to renewable energy and electrification of mobile equipment. Metric: Discussion
What is the total volume of water withdrawn, consumed, and recycled in mining operations? Metric: m³; % recycled
Describe your tailings water management practices and risks, including dam safety protocols (GISTM compliance). Metric: Discussion
What volume of process water is treated and discharged, and what are the quality parameters of discharged water? Metric: m³; quality parameters
How many tailings storage facilities (TSFs) do you operate, and what is their classification under the MAC or ICMM framework? Metric: Number by class
Have any TSF failures or non-conformances occurred in the reporting period? Describe root cause and corrective actions taken. Metric: Number; Discussion
Are all your TSFs reviewed by an independent tailings review board (ITRB)? What were the outcomes of the most recent review? Metric: Yes/No; Discussion
What is your Total Recordable Incident Rate (TRIR) and fatality rate per 200,000 hours worked, broken down by employees and contractors? Metric: Rate
How many cases of occupational disease (silicosis, hearing loss, noise-induced conditions) were recorded? Metric: Number
Describe your occupational health program, including medical surveillance, dust monitoring, and hearing conservation. Metric: Discussion
How many operations have been assessed for risks related to indigenous land rights, cultural heritage, or involuntary resettlement? Metric: Number
What is the total amount of community investment expenditure, and how is it allocated by category (education, health, infrastructure)? Metric: $ amount
Describe your community development strategy and stakeholder engagement approach, including grievance mechanisms. Metric: Discussion
What is your total gross Scope 1 GHG emissions (MT CO₂e) and total fuel burn (million liters) for the reporting period? Metric: MT CO₂e; million liters
What is your fuel efficiency in liters per revenue passenger kilometer (RPK), and how has it trended over five years? Metric: L/100 RPK
What volume and percentage of sustainable aviation fuel (SAF) was used in your fleet during the period? Metric: Liters; % of total fuel
Describe your net-zero pathway, including SAF adoption roadmap, fleet renewal strategy, and carbon offset or removal approach. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your fleet meets the ICAO CAEP/8 noise and emissions standards or equivalent? Metric: % fleet
What percentage of your employees are represented by collective bargaining agreements? Metric: %
How many work stoppages or strikes occurred, and what was the total number of days lost? Metric: Number; days
Describe your pilot and crew fatigue risk management system (FRMS) and compliance with regulatory rest requirements. Metric: Discussion
What is your employee turnover rate by function (cockpit crew, cabin crew, ground operations, administration)? Metric: % by function
What is the total amount of fines or settlements related to antitrust or anti-competitive behaviour? Metric: $ amount
Describe your code of conduct for preventing collusive pricing and capacity coordination with competitors. Metric: Discussion
What is your safety management system (SMS) certification status, and how many reportable aviation events occurred during the period? Metric: SMS status; events
Describe your just culture policy and how safety reporting data informs operational improvements. Metric: Discussion
What is your voluntary safety reporting rate per 1,000 flights, and how has it trended? Metric: Reports/1,000 flights
What is the sales-weighted average fuel economy (km/L or MPGe) of your fleet, broken down by vehicle segment? Metric: km/L or MPGe
What percentage of your fleet sales are battery electric (BEV), plug-in hybrid (PHEV), or hydrogen fuel cell vehicles? Metric: % by units sold
Describe your product roadmap and investment strategy to meet fleet-level emissions regulations through 2030 and 2050. Metric: Discussion
What is the average CO₂ emissions intensity of your new vehicle fleet (gCO₂/km)? Metric: gCO₂/km
What is your total R&D expenditure on electrification, alternative fuels, and advanced powertrains? Metric: $ amount; % of total R&D
What percentage of input materials by weight is recycled or reclaimed content, and what are your targets? Metric: % by weight
Describe your due diligence on conflict minerals (3TG and cobalt) in your supply chain per OECD guidance. Metric: Discussion
Describe your end-of-life vehicle (ELV) recycling and take-back programs, including recovery rate by material type. Metric: % recovery
How many vehicles were recalled during the period, and what was the total number of recall campaigns initiated? Metric: Number; units
What is your NHTSA 5-Star safety rating achievement across new model lines? Metric: % 5-star models
Describe your cybersecurity approach for connected and autonomous vehicles, including over-the-air update protocols. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your direct employees are covered by collective bargaining agreements? Metric: %
Describe your approach to workforce transition planning for employees in combustion-engine-related roles. Metric: Discussion
What is the average fuel economy (km/L) and average CO₂ emissions intensity (gCO₂/km) of your rental fleet? Metric: km/L; gCO₂/km
What percentage of your total fleet is zero-emission or electric vehicles? Metric: % fleet
Describe your fleet electrification strategy and EV charging infrastructure investments. Metric: Discussion
What is your employee turnover rate, and what mechanisms exist for driver and customer-facing staff safety? Metric: % turnover
What are your total Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions (MT CO₂e) and energy consumption (GJ) in manufacturing? Metric: MT CO₂e; GJ
What percentage of energy consumed is from renewable sources, and what are your science-based energy reduction targets? Metric: % renewable
Describe your strategy for reducing Scope 3 (supply chain) emissions, including agricultural sourcing and logistics. Metric: Discussion
What is your total water withdrawn and consumed in manufacturing operations? Identify volume in water-stressed regions separately. Metric: m³; % in stressed areas
Describe your water efficiency programs and reduction targets at individual manufacturing facilities. Metric: Discussion
What is your water intensity (liters per unit of production) and how has it changed over three years? Metric: L/unit
What percentage of key ingredients (palm oil, soy, cocoa, beef, sugar, paper and pulp) are certified to a third-party sustainability standard? Metric: % by volume
Describe your deforestation-free sourcing commitments and supply chain traceability systems for high-risk commodities. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your agricultural supply chain has been assessed for climate-related physical and transition risks? Metric: %
How many supplier audits were conducted during the period for labor, environmental, and food safety compliance? Metric: Number
What percentage of your revenue comes from products with a health and nutrition claim or third-party certification? Metric: % revenue
Describe your responsible marketing policies, especially regarding advertising to children and nutritional communication. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your portfolio by revenue meets your own nutritional profiling criteria for healthy products? Metric: % revenue
What is the number of recalls issued and total units affected due to food safety violations or contamination? Metric: Number; units
What percentage of your production facilities are certified under GFSI-benchmarked schemes (SQF, BRC, FSSC 22000)? Metric: % facilities
Describe your food fraud and adulteration risk management program, including supply chain verification. Metric: Discussion
What is the total energy consumed in restaurant operations, and what is energy intensity per restaurant and per square meter? Metric: GJ; GJ/m²
What percentage of electricity is sourced from renewables, and what energy efficiency certifications do your restaurants hold? Metric: % renewable
Describe your energy management strategy across company-owned and franchised locations, including targets and monitoring. Metric: Discussion
How many foodborne illness complaints were received and confirmed during the reporting period? Metric: Number
What percentage of your restaurant locations underwent third-party food safety audits, and what was the average score? Metric: %; score
Describe your food safety management system, supplier approval processes, and employee food handler training. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of menu items meet your own criteria for healthy or nutritious options? Metric: % items
Describe your calorie labelling, allergen disclosure, and menu reformulation commitments to reduce sodium, sugar, and saturated fat. Metric: Discussion
What is the average calorie count of your most ordered menu items, and how has reformulation reduced this over three years? Metric: kcal; trend
What percentage of key protein and produce suppliers have been assessed for animal welfare, environmental, and labor standards? Metric: %
Describe your commitments on responsible sourcing of beef, seafood, poultry, and produce, including deforestation-free pledges. Metric: Discussion
What are your total Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions and energy consumption across brewing, distilling, and bottling? Metric: MT CO₂e; GJ
What is your energy and water intensity per hectoliter of product produced? Metric: GJ/hL; L/hL
What is your total water consumed per liter of beverage produced (water use ratio)? Metric: L/L
Describe your watershed stewardship programs and commitments in water-stressed sourcing regions. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your advertising spend is directed at media where at least 70% of the audience is of legal drinking age? Metric: % spend
Describe your responsible drinking programs, partnerships with NGOs, and product innovation for lower-alcohol alternatives. Metric: Discussion
What is the energy intensity of your portfolio (kWh/m²) for tenant-controlled and landlord-controlled spaces separately? Metric: kWh/m²
What percentage of your portfolio by floor area has received a green building certification (LEED, BREEAM, NABERS, Green Star)? Metric: % floor area
What percentage of electricity consumed across the portfolio is sourced from renewable energy? Metric: %
Describe your energy management strategy, including smart building technology, LED retrofit programs, and HVAC optimization. Metric: Discussion
What are your portfolio-level science-based targets for energy intensity reduction and renewable energy procurement? Metric: kWh/m² target; % RE target
What is the total water withdrawn and the water intensity (liters/m²) across your portfolio? Metric: m³; L/m²
What percentage of your portfolio by floor area is located in water-stressed areas, and how do you manage this risk? Metric: % area; Discussion
Describe your water sub-metering strategy and leak detection programs across the portfolio. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of new leases include green lease provisions (data sharing, energy targets, fit-out standards)? Metric: % of leases
Describe your tenant engagement strategy for achieving whole-building sustainability performance, including green lease incentives. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of tenants participate in your sustainability reporting and data-sharing programs? Metric: %
What percentage of your portfolio by value is located in 100-year or 500-year flood zones? Metric: % value
Describe how you assess and manage physical climate risks (flood, wildfire, sea level rise, extreme heat) in asset acquisition, underwriting, and operations. Metric: Discussion
What is the expected loss attributable to climate-related physical risks identified through TCFD-aligned scenario analysis? Metric: $ expected loss
What capital expenditure has been allocated to climate resilience and adaptation measures across the portfolio? Metric: $ capex
What percentage of your project backlog (by $ value) is certified or targeting a green building or infrastructure sustainability rating? Metric: % backlog $
Describe your approach to embodied carbon assessment and whole-lifecycle carbon analysis in design and material selection. Metric: Discussion
What is the total embodied carbon (MT CO₂e) reported across projects delivered in the period? Metric: MT CO₂e
What percentage of construction waste is diverted from landfill through recycling and reuse? Metric: % by weight
What is your Total Recordable Incident Rate (TRIR) and fatality rate for direct employees and subcontractors separately? Metric: TRIR; fatalities/200k hrs
Describe your safety leadership programs, contractor pre-qualification requirements, and safety culture measurement approach. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of project sites have a certified safety management system in place? Metric: % sites
How many structural failures or safety-related project recalls occurred, and what were the financial and reputational consequences? Metric: Number; $ cost
Describe your quality assurance program for structural design review, materials testing, and third-party inspections. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of raw materials (cotton, wool, leather, down) are certified to a recognized sustainability standard (e.g., BCI, RWS, Leather Working Group)? Metric: % by weight
Describe your strategy for sourcing sustainable and recycled fibers, including targets for recycled content. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your synthetic fiber sourcing is from recycled sources (e.g., recycled polyester from PET bottles)? Metric: % by weight
What percentage of Tier 1 and Tier 2 manufacturing suppliers have been audited for labor and environmental compliance? Metric: % by tier
How many suppliers were terminated or placed on probation due to non-compliance with your code of conduct? Metric: Number
Describe your programs to address living wages, freedom of association, and safe working conditions in your supply chain. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of your supply chain by spend has been mapped for human rights risks using a due diligence framework? Metric: % spend
What is the total volume of process water discharged from manufacturing, and what percentage meets applicable quality standards? Metric: m³; % compliant
Describe your chemical management program (e.g., Bluesign, ZDHC MRSL) for eliminating hazardous substances in processing. Metric: Discussion
What is the number of recalls and units recalled due to product safety violations during the period? Metric: Number; units
What percentage of products are tested against international safety standards (e.g., EN 71, ASTM F963, ISO 8124) prior to market launch? Metric: % products
Describe your product safety testing protocol, including third-party laboratory testing and consumer feedback mechanisms. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of wood, paper, and fiber inputs are certified to FSC or equivalent standards? Metric: % by weight
Describe your strategy to eliminate PVC, phthalates, and other hazardous materials from product design. Metric: Discussion
What are your total gross Scope 1 GHG emissions (MT CO₂e) and your GHG emission intensity (MT CO₂e per MWh generated)? Metric: MT CO₂e; MT/MWh
What is your generation mix by fuel type (coal, gas, nuclear, hydro, wind, solar, other renewables)? Metric: % by MWh
What are your NOx, SO₂, and mercury emissions in metric tons, and how do they compare to regulatory limits? Metric: MT; vs. limits
Describe your decarbonization strategy including coal phase-out timeline, renewable capacity additions, and carbon capture investments. Metric: Discussion
What are your science-based GHG reduction targets (Scope 1 and 2) and progress to date? Metric: % reduction vs. base year
What is the total water withdrawn and consumed by your thermal generation fleet (liters per MWh)? Metric: L/MWh
Describe your strategy for managing water intake and thermal discharge impacts on aquatic ecosystems. Metric: Discussion
What percentage of residential customers received a disconnection notice or had service terminated due to non-payment? Metric: % customers
Describe your programs to support low-income customers, including rate assistance, payment plans, and energy efficiency subsidies. Metric: Discussion
What is your System Average Interruption Duration Index (SAIDI) and System Average Interruption Frequency Index (SAIFI)? Metric: Minutes; events per customer
Describe your physical and cybersecurity measures for critical grid infrastructure and your emergency response planning. Metric: Discussion
What is the total volume of water sourced, treated, and delivered to customers during the reporting period? Metric: m³
What percentage of your water supply is from surface water, groundwater, and recycled water? Metric: % by source
Describe your demand-side management programs and water loss reduction (non-revenue water) strategy. Metric: Discussion
What is your non-revenue water (NRW) rate as a percentage of total water produced? Metric: % NRW
How many violations of drinking water quality standards occurred, and how many customers were affected? Metric: Number; customers
Describe your water quality monitoring program, including parameters tested and frequency at treatment and distribution points. Metric: Discussion
What is the volume of water saved through customer efficiency programs and rebate schemes? Metric: m³
Describe your climate resilience planning for drought, flood, and changing precipitation patterns on water supply reliability. Metric: Discussion
What are your total Scope 1 and Scope 2 GHG emissions (MT CO₂e) and energy consumption from office operations? Metric: MT CO₂e; GJ
What is your Scope 3 emissions from business air travel (MT CO₂e), and what are your reduction targets? Metric: MT CO₂e
Describe your climate strategy, including office real estate decisions, virtual collaboration adoption, and travel policy. Metric: Discussion
How many client data incidents occurred, and what was the financial impact of remediation and penalties? Metric: Number; $ amount
Describe your information security management system and client data confidentiality protocols. Metric: Discussion
What is the representation of women and underrepresented minorities at the associate, manager, partner, and board levels? Metric: % by level and group
What is your employee billable hour utilization rate, and what policies address burnout and work-life balance? Metric: % utilization
Describe your inclusive hiring, promotion equity analysis, and pay equity audit processes. Metric: Discussion
What is total energy consumed per available room-night (kWh/room-night) for owned and managed properties? Metric: kWh/room-night
What percentage of electricity across the portfolio is sourced from renewables? Metric: %
Describe your energy management strategy across branded, managed, and franchised properties. Metric: Discussion
What is your water intensity (liters per occupied room-night)? Metric: L/room-night
What water efficiency initiatives are in place (e.g., linen reuse, low-flow fixtures, greywater recycling)? Metric: Discussion
What is your employee turnover rate by region and property type? Metric: %
Describe your policies on living wages, worker safety, and human trafficking prevention in hospitality operations. Metric: Discussion
G1. Describe the role of the board in overseeing sustainability and ESG risks and opportunities, including board composition, committee mandates, and frequency of ESG review. Metric: Discussion
G2. What percentage of executive compensation is linked to sustainability or ESG performance metrics? Describe the metrics and their weighting. Metric: % compensation; Discussion
G3. How do you identify, assess, and manage material ESG risks and opportunities, and how are they integrated into your enterprise risk management (ERM) framework? Metric: Discussion
G4. Describe your stakeholder engagement process, including how you identify material issues in alignment with GRI, SASB, or ISSB standards. Metric: Discussion
G5. How many formal grievances were received from external stakeholders, and what is your resolution rate and average time to resolution? Metric: Number; % resolved
G6. What is your total headcount broken down by employment type (full-time, part-time, contractor), geography, and gender? Metric: Number by category
G7. What is your voluntary employee turnover rate, and what are the top-reported reasons for attrition? Metric: %
G8. What is the total amount invested in employee training and development per employee per year? Metric: $ per employee; hours
G9. Describe your approach to pay equity, including the gender and racial pay gap analysis methodology and results. Metric: % gap; Discussion
G10. What is the total recordable injury rate (TRIR) and lost-time injury frequency rate (LTIFR) across your global workforce? Metric: Rate per 200k hours
G11. How many confirmed incidents of bribery, corruption, or violations of your code of conduct occurred, and what disciplinary actions were taken? Metric: Number; Discussion
G12. What is the total value of monetary fines, penalties, and settlements paid related to legal or regulatory violations? Metric: $ amount
G13. What percentage of employees completed ethics and anti-corruption training during the reporting period? Metric: %
Does the board approve sustainability targets and sign off on ESG reporting annually? (CEO CoP statement does NOT count)
Does the code explicitly address human rights, labour, environment, and anti-corruption — for own operations and value chain?
Is there a named person (e.g. Chief Sustainability Officer) or formal committee accountable for each sustainability topic?
Board sustainability committee? Management sustainability committee? SMEs may use "No formal structure" with justification.
Are sustainability risks identified, assessed, and embedded in enterprise risk management? Distinct from due diligence.
Are science-based or time-bound targets set for material sustainability topics? Are they publicly disclosed?
Are executive remuneration or employee KPIs linked to sustainability performance metrics?
Are gender representation targets in place at board/senior management level? (Links to Forward Faster gender equality pillar)
How is sustainability integrated into the core business strategy and capital allocation decisions?
Are suppliers, customers, or investees assessed or engaged on sustainability topics beyond compliance?
Who are material stakeholders? How are they engaged? How are their concerns reflected in strategy?
Does the company publish a comprehensive sustainability/integrated report? Is it externally verified?
Is sustainability reporting subject to limited or reasonable third-party assurance?
Is there a formal HRDD process aligned with UNGPs? Does it cover own operations, suppliers, and business relationships?
What actions were taken based on HRDD findings in the reporting period?
Specific controls for forced labour, child labour, freedom of association, discrimination, and living wage gaps
For each declared material topic: supplier audits, worker voice mechanisms, corrective action plans
Are accessible, trusted, and effective grievance mechanisms in place? Are remedy processes transparent?
Gender breakdown, % employees on living wage, injury rates, turnover, parental leave uptake
% of suppliers assessed, number of high-risk suppliers, corrective actions initiated vs closed
How are HRDD findings and grievance outcomes disclosed? What lessons fed back into processes?
Is there a board-approved environmental policy? Does it reference precautionary principle? Is it publicly available?
Physical and transition climate risks identified? Water stress, biodiversity exposure assessed in operations and supply chain?
Are GHG reduction, water, or biodiversity targets set? Are they science-based (SBTi) or net-zero aligned?
ISO 14001 or equivalent? Does it cover value chain? Is it third-party certified?
Scope 1, 2, and 3 emissions (metric tonnes CO₂e). Base year, methodology, boundary, and intensity metrics required.
Total energy (MWh), % from renewables, energy intensity ratio. Breakdown by source encouraged.
Megalitres withdrawn by source, % in water-stressed areas, recycling rate. Aligned with CDP Water.
Is there a standalone anti-bribery and corruption (ABC) policy? Does it cover facilitation payments, gifts, political contributions, and conflicts of interest?
Does the ABC policy explicitly cover third parties (agents, JV partners, suppliers)?
Are high-risk markets, business units, or transaction types identified? Is corruption risk mapped to specific geographies or functions?
Number of confirmed incidents, nature of incidents, legal proceedings or sanctions, monetary losses
% of employees trained on anti-corruption policies, including management and board. Training frequency and format.
Is there an accessible, confidential reporting channel? Are reports investigated independently? Are reporters protected from retaliation?
Number of reports received, % investigated, outcome categories, improvements made, and public disclosure of findings
